case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. EVELYN FERNANDEZ

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR APR-02-25 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. CONTINUED TO APRIL 21, 2025. PLAINTIFF IS ADVISED THAT COURTESY DOCUMENTS MUST BE FASTENED; EACH FILED DOCUMENT SHOULD BE FASTENED AS ONE. GOING FORWARD, STACKS OF LOOSE PAPER, LIKE THE ONE RECEIVED AS "COURTESY COPIES" ON THIS MOTION, WILL BE DISCARDED AND THE MOTION WILL BE DISPOSED OF AS IF NO COURTESY COPIES WERE LODGED. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, COURT TRIAL SET FOR SEP-22-2025 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON MAY-14-2025 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR SEP-22-2025 - CASE SETTLED PER NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT. NO APPEARANCES AT TRIAL CALL. ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 610 ON AUG-17-2027 AT 10:30 AM FOR DISMISSAL PER CRC 3.1385. JUDGE: ROCHELLE EAST; CLERK: D. LOK; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 73593664) FILED BY DEFENDANT FERNANDEZ, EVELYN AN INDIVIDUAL
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-21-25 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. OFF CALENDAR FOR FAILURE TO PROVIDE TENABLE COURTESY COPIES IN COMPLIANCE WITH SF LOCAL RULE 2.7B AND THE COURT'S 4/2/25 ORDER ADVISING THE PARTIES THAT THE LOOSE STACKS OF PAPER IT RECEIVED AS COURTESY COPIES ON THIS MOTION WOULD BE DISPOSED OF AS IF NO COURTESY COPIES WERE LODGED. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-22-2025 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Aug-17-27 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-25-2025 Set For Trial On Sep-22-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-21-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.

Off calendar for failure to provide tenable courtesy copies in compliance with SF Local Rule 2.7B and the court's 4/2/25 order advising the parties that the loose stacks of paper it received as courtesy copies on this motion would be disposed of as if no courtesy copies were lodged.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-02-2025 Continued To Apr-21-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.

Continued to April 21, 2025. Plaintiff is advised that courtesy documents must be fastened; each filed document should be fastened as one. Going forward, stacks of loose paper, like the one received as "courtesy copies" on this motion, will be discarded and the motion will be disposed of as if no courtesy copies were lodged.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-12-2024 Continued To May-14-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
